DEFT'S MOTION FOR RETURN OF PROPERTY FILED
DEFT'S MOT FOR RETURN OF PROPERTY FILED

/CAL: MOTION FOR RETURN PROPERTY/NP/X: DEFENSE COUNSEL IS NOT PRESENT,/X:COUNSEL FOR THE PEOPLE IS NOT PRESENT,/X: RONNIE WAGNER FROM POLICE LEGALIS PRESENT,/MO DENIED/X: MOTION IS DENIED WITH PREJUDICE,/X: ORDER FORDESTRUCTION OF MARIJUANA SIGNED BY JUDGE ULMER AND FILED,/

/CAL PRELIMINARY HEARING/WIT SWORN SFPD OFFICER JOSH MCFALL/EXHMA:PEOPLE 1- MANILLA ENVELOPE MARKED AS EVIDENCE # 1- 12 PLASTIC BAGGIEWITH GREEN LEAFY SUBSTANCE, PEOPLE 2- MANILLA ENVELOPE MARKED AS EVIDENCE #2- 6 BAGGIES WITH GREEN LEAFY SUBSTANCE AND PEOPLE 3- MANILLA ENVELOPE MARKED AS EVIDENCE # 3- 2 BAGGIES WITH GREAN LEAFY SUBSTANCE    /X:COURT ORDERS ALL EXHIBITS TO BE RETURNED TO SUBMITTING PARTY/871D:1 & 2/BE/
/CAL:MOTION FOR RETURN OF PROPERTY/NP/X:APPEARANCE BY ATTORNEY RONNIE WAGNER ON BEHALF OF SFPD LEGAL DEPARTMENT/CONT/
/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW/LD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING IS 05-23-13/987,2/BAIL:60,000/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DO
